WHAT CHANGES

When the mechanical work runs itself,
your team can do more of what matters.

Speed
MARVIN delivers a first structured output within hours and a full engagement in days, not weeks, so your team stays available for what matters most.
From
To
Research taking days
First structured output in one day
Deals turned down due to limited capacity
Accepting mandates that previously had no available team
Depth
Every engagement goes further because agents source more data, challenge more sources, and conduct more expert interviews than your team could manage under time pressure.
From
To
Limited data found due to time constraints
More reliable data and triangulated faster
Limited expert interviews due to time spent on production
More expert interviews, more depth per engagement
Focus
Your seniors spend their time in client conversations, on-site visits, and expert interviews — not reconciling models or formatting outputs.
From
To

More on-site visits, more client interactions
Scale
The same team handles more mandates and deeper workstreams because the capacity ceiling was always the mechanical work, not the thinking.
From
To
Assumptions buried in models
Every claim traced to a source, every inference labeled

THE WORKFLOW

You define the mission.
MARVIN runs the work.
You make the decisions.

STEP 1
Brief
Define the target, the client, the central investment question. Ten minutes. The specialist AI agents configure automatically from there.
STEP 2
Execute
Specialist AI agents work across every workstream. You are free to focus on what only you can do.
STEP 3
Decide
At structured gates, your judgment applies. Validate findings. Challenge the storyline. Name the weak link. You intervene only where your level is required.
MISSION TYPES

Built for specific types of consulting work — the engagements where analytical rigor and speed matter most.

CLIENT-READY OUTPUT

Client-ready output. Every claim defended.

MARVIN doesn't produce summaries. It produces structured findings — each labeled by confidence level, traced to its source, reasoning chain explicit. Your name goes on the report. You defend every line.

THE TEAM

Every mission deploys a dedicated team of specialist AI agents, configured for the mission type.

You don't brief them. They activate when the mission starts. At every gate, your judgment applies.

Thesis
Generates testable hypotheses, selects frameworks, declares the analytical structure before any work begins.
Dora
Builds bottom-up TAM, challenges management figures, maps competitive landscape and assesses moat and competitive window.
Calculus
Parses data room, detects anomalies between management claims and actual numbers, runs Quality of Earnings and cohort analysis.
Lector
Generates interview guides tailored by profile, structures transcripts, detects patterns across interviews.
MARVIN
orchestration
Coordinates all agents end-to-end across every workstream
Adversus
Attacks every hypothesis from three angles — empirical, logical, contextual. Identifies the weakest link before it reaches you.
Merlin
Evaluates whether findings form a coherent, MECE argument. Issues an investment recommendation: Invest, Invest with conditions, Do not invest, or Insufficient evidence.
Papyrus
Assembles the full mission state into PDF report, executive summary deck, and data book. Runs pre-flight checks before generation.
More agents
in development

At every gate, your team validates what matters.
Findings are reviewed. Storylines are challenged. Decisions are human.
